originalTitle: Salesforce’s stock extends record losing streak. Can the company disrupt itself?
summary: Shares of Salesforce posted their 14th consecutive day of losses as investors remain unconvinced of the company’s AI momentum.
content: Shares of Salesforce posted their 14th consecutive day of losses as investors remain unconvinced of the company’s AI momentum.
chineseTitle: Salesforce 的股价延续了创纪录的跌势。公司能否自我颠覆？
chineseSummary: 由于投资者仍不相信该公司的人工智能发展势头，Salesforce 的股价连续 14 天下跌。
chineseContent: 由于投资者仍不相信该公司的人工智能发展势头，Salesforce 的股价连续 14 天下跌。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
